task_completion.description: Create a 'Critical Bug Alert' subscription for the TailwindTraders Team.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Azure DevOps Project Settings -> Notifications page, a custom subscription named 'Critical Bug Alert' is visible in the list of subscriptions.

task_completion.description: Configure the 'Critical Bug Alert' subscription to trigger when a Bug with Priority 1 is created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The filter criteria for the 'Critical Bug Alert' subscription show conditions for Work Item Type = 'Bug' and Priority = '1'.

task_completion.description: Create a 'Resolution Notification' subscription for the TailwindTraders Team.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Azure DevOps Project Settings -> Notifications page, a custom subscription named 'Resolution Notification' is visible in the list of subscriptions.

task_completion.description: Configure the 'Resolution Notification' subscription to trigger when a work item state changes to 'Resolved'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The filter criteria for the 'Resolution Notification' subscription show conditions for State = 'Resolved' (or State changes to 'Resolved').

task_completion.description: Disable the default team subscription 'A work item is assigned to a member of the team'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Notifications list, the default subscription named 'A work item is assigned to a member of the team' is toggled off, unchecked, or marked as disabled.

integrity.description: The agent used the Azure DevOps web interface to configure notifications.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser navigating the Azure DevOps portal at http://localhost/DefaultCollection.

integrity.description: The agent did not use scripts or terminal commands to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows or scripts (like PowerShell, Bash, or Python) are used to make API calls to Azure DevOps.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual application settings.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the genuine Azure DevOps Project Settings -> Notifications page with UI elements being clicked or edited, not a text editor or mocked UI.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Project URL: http://localhost/DefaultCollection. Project Name: TailwindTraders. Expected filters for Critical Bug Alert: Work Item Type = 'Bug', Priority = '1'. Expected filters for Resolution Notification: State = 'Resolved'. The default subscription to disable is exactly 'A work item is assigned to a member of the team'.
